name: Libra Energy Materials Inc.
description: Libra Energy Materials Inc. is a junior critical minerals explorer focused on lithium, graphite, and cobalt projects in Ontario and Quebec, Canada, and Brazil. The company's flagship Canadian properties — Flanders North, Flanders South, and SBC in Ontario — are subject to a C$33 million earn-in agreement with KoBold Metals, and its recent acquisition of Brion Minerals adds a portfolio of 21 lithium, 8 graphite, and 1 cobalt-nickel project in Brazil. Libra is in the early exploration stage and commenced its maiden drill program at the Stimson Lithium-Cesium project in Ontario in 2025.
